positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a majestic, ethereal celestial owl perched on a branch of bioluminescent fractal flora. The owl is rendered with sharp, graphic feather details and glowing geometric patterns. The background is a deep indigo nebula with swirling emerald and gold dust clouds. The overall style is Neo-Art Deco meets Celestial Minimalism, utilizing strong silhouettes and clean lines. The color palette should be dominated by electric blues, vibrant teals, deep purples, and highlights of glowing gold. Perfect for a central, striking print on dark fabric. Vector illustration quality, high contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, detailed linework.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, ugly, bad anatomy, distorted, noise, multiple subjects, extra limbs
